{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20568_1
|class_id=20568
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=collection@20568_2
|fame=18
|art=16
|fth=13
|civ=29
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +2<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss2=Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +4<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss3=Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +6<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss4=Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +6<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160
|ss7=Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 8 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +6<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 160/160<br> (Awakened)
}}
